title: 5) Treatment result
text:
Treatment result varies depending on age, past history, general health, skin condition,
current medication, history of other cosmetic interventions, and red ﬂags like smoking or
repetitive sun-tanning. Therefore, the practitioner should set a reasonable treatment goal in
the initial meeting and needs to modify the goal based on conditions again during progress.
First of all, the treatment goal should be not removal of all the problems, but a slowing
down the of the aging process  in a healthy way.
16
The assessment of result may be very subjective. While the practitioner may think the
patient improved dramatically, the patient might not be satisﬁed with the results. For this
reason, taking pictures, comparing before and after treatment, and modifying the treatment
goal are recommended.
